# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3.7'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.15.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m
    volumes:
      - esdata:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    networks:
      - elk_net
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.15.0
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms256m -Xmx256m
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/conf:/usr/share/logstash/config
    networks:
      - elk_net
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.15.0
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk_net
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.15.0
    container_name: apm-server
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOST=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - APMSERVER_KIBANA_HOST=kibana:5601
    networks:
      - elk_net
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"

networks:
  elk_net:

volumes:
  esdata:
    driver: local
